reviews.comment:
Estuvimos 4 días y los baños siempre sucios iguales, las entradas a la estación rotas y en mal estado. La atención de los playeros súper buena y con buena predisposición...

(Translated by Google)
We stayed for four days and the bathrooms were always the same dirty, and the station entrances were broken and in poor condition. The staff were very helpful and helpful, though.
